samples.xml_description:
Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. The data_en input is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in input is constant during the period when data_en=1. So, sample the data_in when data_en=1 and synchronize it to clk_b. The data change frequency of data_in is very low. The change interval between two adjacent data is at least 10 clk_b clock cycles. The clock clk_a is responsible for data_in and data_en. The clock clk_b is responsible for the 2 D flip-flops. Clock signal A. Clock signal B. Active-low reset signal A. Active-low reset signal B. Input data. Input enable. Output data. State one. State two. state_one state_two state_one state_one

Define a register data_reg to store the input data signal.

Define a register en_data_reg to store the input enable signal.

Define two registers, en_clap_one and en_clap_two, to control the selection of the input data.

On the positive edge of clock signal A (clk_a) or the falling edge of reset signal A (arstn), update the data_reg and en_data_reg registers.

If the reset signal A (arstn) is low, indicating a reset condition, set the data_reg and en_data_reg registers to 0.

If the reset signal A (arstn) is high, update the data_reg and en_data_reg registers with the data_in and data_en signals, respectively.

On the positive edge of clock signal B (clk_b) or the falling edge of reset signal B (brstn), update the en_clap_one and en_clap_two registers.

If the reset signal B (brstn) is low, indicating a reset condition, set both registers (en_clap_one and en_clap_two) to 0.

If the reset signal B (brstn) is high, update the registers based on the value of en_data_reg.

On the positive edge of clock signal B (clk_b) or the falling edge of reset signal B (brstn), assign the output data value.

If the reset signal B (brstn) is low, indicating a reset condition, set the output data (dataout) to 0.

If the reset signal B (brstn) is high and the control signal (en_clap_two) is active, assign the output data (dataout) the value of the data register (data_reg).

If the control signal (en_clap_two) is inactive, retain the previous value of the output data (dataout).
